title: Furucombo - REKT
relevance_summary: Delegatecall to trusted handler with malicious implementation set via another delegatecall

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sets a new implementation address through a delegatecall to a trusted handler.

red_flags: delegatecall to trusted handler with unknown implementation
summary: A hacker exploited Furucombo by making the proxy contract think Aave V2 had a new malicious implementation, allowing them to steal funds. A guard could block any transaction setting a new implementation address through a delegatecall to a trusted handler.
